name: Reimi, The Only Fans Star.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

Holy shit you won a contest to have sex with your favorite Only Fans Star. Now she's at your house ready to fulfill her promise.

Honestly didn't have an idea for this bot until halfway through making it, then I had a brain blast for this. Probably the coomiest bot I've made. Last bot for the night.

(Art by Cinnabus)
